title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Say Buy These 3 Tech Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields - Corning (NYSE:GLW), Juniper Networks (NYSE:JNPR)
text: During times of turbulence and uncertainty in the markets, many investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. These are often companies that have high free cash flows and reward shareholders with a high dividend payout.

title: Corning: There Is Still Time To Accumulate Shares
text: Corning's stock has shown minimal returns over the past years, underperforming the broader market. Corning's dominance in key market segments and strategic pricing moves are poised to positively impact revenue and profitability. The stock has maintained a consistent upward trend since 2001, and the current price plateau probably signifies an accumulation phase.

title: Corning: A Timeless Gem Poised For A Comeback
text: Corning is a long-standing company with a diverse portfolio of products, including display technologies, optical communications, and specialty materials. The company has experienced a recent downturn in revenue and margins due to supply chain disruptions and cost inflation, but there are signs of improvement. Corning may benefit from the AI boom and expects growth in its optical communications, automotive exteriors, and solar business. The stock is attractively priced and offers an appealing dividend yield.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued 5G Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: Fifth-generation wireless (5G) is becoming the global standard for wireless networks. But the full rollout of 5G will take several years – and billions of dollars.
